notes: Retired the guided setup gate from Pathmark Online.
Pathmark Online now opens directly to the normal workspace after Google Sheets preparation.
The Pathmark creation wizard on Home replaces setup as the main first-run and ongoing creation flow.
Settings now points users to the Creation wizard and any unfinished wizard draft instead of offering guided setup controls.
Updated Home wording so empty workspaces direct users to the creation wizard rather than setup.
release_notes: Retires the guided setup gate. Pathmark Online now opens directly to the workspace, with the Pathmark creation wizard on Home replacing setup as the first-run and ongoing flow for creating Projects and Routines.
